title: Hacking Principles 2026
summary: Principles Ship small, ship often. Prefer boring tech for critical paths. Tests document intent; keep them readable. Make rollback easy before adding features. Notes These principles are intentionally concise so they can be memorized and debated.
content: Principles Ship small, ship often. Prefer boring tech for critical paths. Tests document intent; keep them readable. Make rollback easy before adding features. Notes These principles are intentionally concise so they can be memorized and debated.
